fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project.

fields.name: Job Task No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project task.

fields.name: Job WIP Total Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry number from the associated project WIP total.

fields.name: Warning Message
fields.tooltip: Specifies a warning message that is related to a project WIP calculation.
